transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Robert Klein. I'm calling because my sub-panel is not working. Dispatcher: Hi Robert, I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me what brand it is? Customer: It's a Generac, an older one, 15 years. Dispatcher: Okay, and what's the service address? Customer: 22 Oak Court. Dispatcher: Got it. We can send a technician out first thing tomorrow. Does that work? Customer: Yes, that would be great. Thank you.

expected_entities.equipment: Generac sub-panel, an older one, 15 years
